positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial map composition featuring interconnected constellations and abstract geometric lines. The primary elements should be a serene crescent moon, a stylized grouping of nebula gas clouds rendered in deep indigo and teal gradients, and crisp, glowing golden stellar pathways connecting them. The design must be perfectly circular for central placement on apparel, with strong negative space around the subject matter. Incorporate a few scattered, abstract stylized planets rendered as clean solid circles. Style: Japanese woodblock print meets Art Deco graphic design. Composition: Symmetrical and radial. Lighting: Glowing, ethereal luminescence against a deep matte black background. Color Palette: Indigo, Teal, Gold, and Black. Aspect Ratio: Perfect square, highly suitable for merchandise.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, border, grainy, low detail, noisy, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, messy, childish
